negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Missing AsyncCollectionStats return/log record with scheduled/regular/total simulated counts, accepted count, deadline-skipped count, parallel mode, deadline fields, and fallback outcome.
related_but_insufficient_code: BlockBuildPhaseTrace can record generic phase duration and payload builder debug logs record candidate/deadline counts, but no AsyncCollectionStats type or lifecycle stats record was found.

rationale: The stats candidate is an observability invariant rather than a consensus rule, and no later bounded candidate removes it.
statement: Payload async transaction collection should return and log AsyncCollectionStats covering scheduled candidate and simulated counts, regular simulated count, total simulated count, accepted count, deadline-skipped count, parallel mode, deadline fields, and fallback outcome when the deadline is exceeded.
suggested_falsification_tests: Run async collection with scheduled and regular candidates, deadline exhaustion, and fallback path; assert a structured AsyncCollectionStats record exposes all required fields.

Assert debug/RPC surfaces include scheduled candidate count, regular simulated count, total simulated count, accepted count, deadline-skipped count, parallel mode, deadline fields, and fallback outcome.
summary: Detailed async collection lifecycle stats are absent.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Search/build for AsyncCollectionStats and lifecycle fields; current port lacks the type and logs only generic payload/deadline events.
title: Async collection emits detailed lifecycle stats
